description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS user security tables. Covers FND users, showing and setting responsibilities, and the assignment that grants a user access to a responsibility.

tables.description: Stores Oracle EBS application user accounts. Each row represents a login account that can be assigned responsibilities.

columns.name: USER_ID
columns.description: Unique numeric identifier for the user (Primary Key).

columns.name: USER_NAME
columns.description: The login name of the user (e.g. JSMITH). Case-insensitive in practice; stored in upper-case.

columns.name: START_DATE
columns.description: Date from which the user account is active.

columns.name: END_DATE
columns.description: Date the user account expires. NULL means the account does not expire. Active users have END_DATE IS NULL or END_DATE > SYSDATE.

columns.name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.description: Email address associated with the account.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text description of the user.

columns.name: LAST_LOGON_DATE
columns.description: Timestamp of the user's most recent successful login.

columns.name: PERSON_PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HZ_PARTIES — links the FND user to an HR or TCA person record.

tables.description: Translated display names and descriptions for EBS responsibilities. Use this table to look up a responsibility by its human-readable name. Join to FND_RESPONSIBILITY on RESPONSIBILITY_ID + APPLICATION_ID.

columns.name: RESPONSIBILITY_ID
columns.description: Numeric identifier for the responsibility (part of composite PK with APPLICATION_ID and LANGUAGE).

columns.name: APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Identifier of the application that owns this responsibility (part of composite PK).

columns.name: LANGUAGE
columns.description: NLS language code for this row (e.g. US). Filter on LANGUAGE = 'US' to get English names.

columns.name: RESPONSIBILITY_NAME
columns.description: The human-readable name of the responsibility as it appears in EBS (e.g. 'Payables Manager').

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text description of what the responsibility provides access to.

tables.description: Base table for EBS responsibilities. Each row defines an access role that groups menus and functions. Responsibilities are assigned to users via FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_ALL.

columns.name: RESPONSIBILITY_ID
columns.description: Numeric identifier for the responsibility (Primary Key with APPLICATION_ID).

columns.name: APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Identifier of the application that owns the responsibility.

columns.name: RESPONSIBILITY_KEY
columns.description: Short internal code / developer key for the responsibility (e.g. AP_MANAGER). Useful for programmatic references.

columns.name: MENU_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to FND_MENUS — the top-level menu this responsibility exposes.

columns.name: DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Controls which database schema the responsibility queries against.

columns.name: START_DATE
columns.description: Date from which the responsibility is active.

columns.name: END_DATE
columns.description: Date the responsibility expires. NULL means no expiry.

tables.description: Junction / assignment table that grants a specific EBS user access to a specific responsibility, optionally scoped to a security group. One row per user-responsibility-security_group combination.

columns.name: USER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to FND_USER — the user being granted access.

columns.name: RESPONSIBILITY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to FND_RESPONSIBILITY — the responsibility being granted.

columns.name: RESPONSIBILITY_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to FND_RESPONSIBILITY.APPLICATION_ID — needed with RESPONSIBILITY_ID to uniquely identify the responsibility.

columns.name: SECURITY_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Security group scoping the grant. Typically 0 for the standard security group.

columns.name: START_DATE
columns.description: Date from which the assignment is effective.

columns.name: END_DATE
columns.description: Date the assignment expires. NULL means the grant does not expire. Active assignments have END_DATE IS NULL or END_DATE > SYSDATE.

tables.description: Lookup table of Oracle EBS application modules. Used to decode APPLICATION_ID values found in FND_RESPONSIBILITY and related tables.

columns.name: APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Numeric identifier for the application (Primary Key).

columns.name: APPLICATION_SHORT_NAME
columns.description: Short code for the application (e.g. SQLAP for Payables, AR for Receivables, FND for Application Object Library).

common_joins.description: List all active responsibilities for a given user (by USER_NAME)
common_joins.join_condition: FND_USER.USER_ID = FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_ALL.USER_ID AND FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_ALL.RESPONSIBILITY_ID = FND_RESPONSIBILITY_TL.RESPONSIBILITY_ID AND FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_ALL.RESPONSIBILITY_APPLICATION_ID = FND_RESPONSIBILITY_TL.APPLICATION_ID AND FND_RESPONSIBILITY_TL.LANGUAGE = 'US' AND (FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_ALL.END_DATE IS NULL OR FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_ALL.END_DATE > SYSDATE)

common_joins.description: Include the owning application short name alongside the responsibility
Join base responsibility to its translated name
common_joins.join_condition: FND_RESPONSIBILITY.RESPONSIBILITY_ID = FND_RESPONSIBILITY_TL.RESPONSIBILITY_ID AND FND_RESPONSIBILITY.APPLICATION_ID = FND_RESPONSIBILITY_TL.APPLICATION_ID AND FND_RESPONSIBILITY_TL.LANGUAGE = 'US'

common_joins.description: Filter for currently active user accounts only
common_joins.join_condition: FND_USER.END_DATE IS NULL OR FND_USER.END_DATE > SYSDATE

example_queries.description: All active responsibilities assigned to a specific user
example_queries.sql: SELECT r.responsibility_key, a.application_short_name, rt.responsibility_name||' - '||a.application_short_name as description FROM fnd_user u JOIN fnd_user_resp_groups_all urg ON u.user_id = urg.user_id     JOIN fnd_responsibility       r ON urg.responsibility_id = r.responsibility_id                                  AND urg.responsibility_application_id = r.application_id     JOIN fnd_responsibility_tl    rt ON r.responsibility_id = rt.responsibility_id                                      AND r.application_id = rt.application_id                                      AND rt.language = 'US'     JOIN fnd_application          a ON r.application_id = a.application_id WHERE         upper(u.user_name) = upper(:username)     AND ( urg.end_date IS NULL           OR urg.end_date > sysdate ) ORDER BY     rt.responsibility_name

example_queries.description: All users who hold a specific responsibility (by name)
example_queries.sql: SELECT u.USER_NAME, u.EMAIL_ADDRESS, urg.START_DATE, urg.END_DATE FROM FND_USER u JOIN FND_USER_RESP_GROUPS_ALL urg ON u.USER_ID = urg.USER_ID JOIN FND_RESPONSIBILITY_TL rt ON urg.RESPONSIBILITY_ID = rt.RESPONSIBILITY_ID AND urg.RESPONSIBILITY_APPLICATION_ID = rt.APPLICATION_ID AND rt.LANGUAGE = 'US' WHERE UPPER(rt.RESPONSIBILITY_NAME) = UPPER(:responsibility_name) AND (urg.END_DATE IS NULL OR urg.END_DATE > SYSDATE) AND (u.END_DATE IS NULL OR u.END_DATE > SYSDATE) ORDER BY u.USER_NAME

example_queries.description: Set and initialize active responsibility for user
example_queries.sql: BEGIN fnd_global.apps_initialize( user_id => :user_id, resp_id => :resp_id, resp_appl_id => :resp_appl_id ); END;
